---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**

What are you trying to do that the viewer makes hard or impossible today?

**The idea**

What you would like it to do instead.

**Alternatives**

Other approaches you considered, or how you work around this now.

**Scope check**

OpenLiDARViewer is a lightweight, local-first viewer, not a full GIS or
survey-grade processing suite. Requests that fit that scope are easiest to
land. See the [roadmap](../../docs/roadmap.md) and
[limitations](../../docs/limitations.md) for what is already planned or
deliberately out of scope.

**Anything else**

Mockups, links, or examples that make the idea concrete.
